title: Any Weather Channeling (AWC)
description: Allows you to configure how channeling should summon lightning!
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4e972cd9de2dc55ada5b8aa3524798efd2a2c09.png)
# 📌・Any Weather Channeling v3.0
**Allows you to configure how channeling should summon lightning! (configurable)**

It can be frustrating to have to wait for a thunderstorm just to use channeling. That's why I created this datapack as a solution! With this datapack, you can customize channeling to work in any weather, during rain, or even have a small chance of lightning appearing during rain, with a guaranteed chance during a thunderstorm. And the best part is, it's all customizable!

**Warning:** 1.21.4+ is not tested yet.

**Original PlanetMC Page: [[Click Here]](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/any-weather-channeling/)**

# ⚙️・Configure how lightning should appear:

<details>
<summary>Lightning can appear during all weather types.</summary>

```
/scoreboard players set #awc.config.ppl awc.config.sc 1
```



</details>

<details>
<summary>Lightning can only appear during rain or thunderstorms.</summary>

```
/scoreboard players set #awc.config.ppl awc.config.sc 2
```



</details>

<details>
<summary>40% chance of lightning during rain and a 100% chance during thunderstorms.</summary>

```
/scoreboard players set #awc.config.ppl awc.config.sc 3
```
</details>
<details>
<summary>40% chance of lightning during rain and clear weather, and a 100% chance during thunderstorms.</summary>
  
```
/scoreboard players set #awc.config.ppl awc.config.sc 4
```


</details>

</details>
<details>
<summary>Vanilla (lightning only appears during thunderstorms).</summary>
  
```
/scoreboard players set #awc.config.ppl awc.config.sc 5
```


</details>
